panels.title: Pick an entity (sorted by recent change activity)
panels.description: Click an entity_id below, then paste it into the variable above to see its full per-field timeline.

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.id AS "entity_id", e.source_id, e.identity, count(c.id) AS "changes", max(c.changed_at) AS "last_change", e.last_seen AS "last_seen", e.stale FROM entities e LEFT JOIN entity_changes c ON c.entity_id = e.id WHERE ($source_id = 0 OR e.source_id = $source_id) GROUP BY e.id, e.source_id, e.identity, e.last_seen, e.stale ORDER BY changes DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50

panels.title: Numeric field history for entity $entity_id
panels.description: One line per numeric field on the entity. Source: entity_changes log. If your fields are non-numeric, this panel will be empty — see the table below instead.

targets.rawSql: SELECT changed_at AS "time", field AS metric, (new_value #>> '{}')::numeric AS value FROM entity_changes WHERE entity_id = $entity_id AND new_value IS NOT NULL AND jsonb_typeof(new_value) IN ('number','string') AND (new_value #>> '{}') ~ '^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$' ORDER BY changed_at
SELECT changed_at, field, (old_value #>> '{}') AS old_value, (new_value #>> '{}') AS new_value, run_id FROM entity_changes WHERE entity_id = $entity_id ORDER BY changed_at DESC LIMIT 200
